Entry.JapaneseText: プルート
Entry.EnglishText: Pluto

Entry.JapaneseText: <Claus>
Entry.EnglishText: <Claus>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Suzu>
Entry.EnglishText: <Suzu>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Cless>
Entry.EnglishText: <Cless>

Entry.JapaneseText: <Dio>
Entry.EnglishText: <Dio>

Entry.JapaneseText: Variable
Entry.EnglishText: Variable

Entry.JapaneseText: オリジンの力を 使ったのは貴様たちか
Entry.EnglishText: I see, so you are the maggots wielding Origin's power.

Entry.JapaneseText: ダオス戦役以来だな
Entry.EnglishText: It's been a while since the fight against Dhaos.

Entry.JapaneseText: その節はずいぶんと 世話になったな。 こたびは何用だ
Entry.EnglishText: That time, I was asked to assist with your cause. What concerns you this time?

Entry.JapaneseText: 魔界へ帰りなさい、 プルート！
Entry.EnglishText: Return to Daemonium, Pluto!

Entry.JapaneseText: かつて、ともに戦った者を 不当に排除するか
Entry.EnglishText: So you would raise your weapons against an old comrade.

Entry.JapaneseText: 不当に 地上を侵略しているのは そちらです！
Entry.EnglishText: You are the one who initiated this conflict by attacking the surface!

Entry.JapaneseText: 精霊王との契約で 閉じられた扉を開き、 地上を瘴気に沈めた！
Entry.EnglishText: You have breached your contract with the King of the Spirits, dissolved the barrier and flooded the world with poisonous Miasma!

Entry.JapaneseText: 精霊王との契約か…… 確かにそんなものもあったな
Entry.EnglishText: It is true I had made a pact with the King of the Spirits...

Entry.JapaneseText: しかし、 もはや数千年も前の 朽ち果てた約束
Entry.EnglishText: However, that was a promise made thousands of years in the past, weathered away by the passage of time.

Entry.JapaneseText: 精霊の王との崇高な契約を 『朽ち果てた』とは……
Entry.EnglishText: The contract with the King of the Spirits has..."weathered away"...?

Entry.JapaneseText: 知らぬようだから、 教えてやる
Entry.EnglishText: If you are ignorant to the circumstances, I would be glad to inform you.

Entry.JapaneseText: もともと、 この地上は我々のもの だったのだぞ
Entry.EnglishText: We are the rightful rulers of the surface.

Entry.JapaneseText: なんだって？
Entry.EnglishText: What's that!?

Entry.JapaneseText: ラグナロク後、 この地上はその影響で 瘴気の海に満たされていた
Entry.EnglishText: The fallout of Ragnarok was severe. The surface was fully plunged into an ocean of Miasma.

Entry.JapaneseText: 我々、魔界の民は その瘴気の海から 生まれたのだ
Entry.EnglishText: We denizens of Daemonium were born in said precious sea of Miasma.

Entry.JapaneseText: 百数十年に渡って我々は、 この地上を支配した
Entry.EnglishText: A hundred decades or so passed. The surface was rightfully under our control.

Entry.JapaneseText: そんな……嘘だ……
Entry.EnglishText: No...that has to be a lie...

Entry.JapaneseText: 嘘ではない
Entry.EnglishText: This is only the truth.

Entry.JapaneseText: その世界の支配者たる我々を 精霊王オリジンは魔界へと 放逐したのだ
Entry.EnglishText: Our domination of the surface was cut short by the ruler of the world. Origin saw fit to banish our kind to Daemonium.

Entry.JapaneseText: 世界をラグナロク以前の 人の世界に戻すため
Entry.EnglishText: With his powers, he decided to bring the world and people back to how they were prior to Ragnarok.

Entry.JapaneseText: だから今度はおまえたちが それを自分たちの手に 取り戻そうというのか
Entry.EnglishText: So you believe you're just reclaiming what was snatched away from you, is that it?

Entry.JapaneseText: その通り、 それが我ら魔界の民の悲願
Entry.EnglishText: That is correct. Our dearest wish is for Daemoniums' denizens to rule in their rightful realm.

Entry.JapaneseText: やがて、すべての街が 瘴気の底に沈む
Entry.EnglishText: Soon, no town will be spared from the all-consuming Miasma.

Entry.JapaneseText: 我が幾億の同胞たちが、 魔界より姿を現し、 世界をその掌中にするだろう
Entry.EnglishText: With my innumerable brethren, Daemonium will overwhelm and reclaim the world that was once our own.

Entry.JapaneseText: そんなんさせねー！ な、<Suzu>ちゃん
Entry.EnglishText: Keep on dreaming, ya oversized slug! Right, <Suzu>?

Entry.JapaneseText: はい。あなたを倒して、 私はこの世界を守ります
Entry.EnglishText: Yes. We will defeat you and protect our world!

Entry.JapaneseText: 我らが悲願を阻む者、 許すわけにはいかぬ
Entry.EnglishText: You who stand in the way of our dearest wish... You will be granted no quarter.

Entry.JapaneseText: 来い！ 叩きのめして、 その魂、魔界の底へ 封じ込めん！
Entry.EnglishText: Come! I shall mince your bodies apart and bury your souls in the deepest depths of Daemonium!
